differences: The lower half remains information-dense on mobile, though it is now readable and scroll-safe.
The scatter tooltip is improved but still anchored to the chart shell rather than the exact hovered point.
suggestions: Keep compressing lower-page copy and linked-detail sections instead of re-adding dashboard chrome.
If deeper scatter work is needed later, position the tooltip nearer the hovered marker without adding a heavy charting dependency.
reasoning: The major defects are closed: the summary border duplication is gone, the explanatory comparison is stable, the context copy is cleaner, the failure branch reads correctly, and the player state transitions now behave coherently.
